title: [ImportVerilog] Fix crash when using `$` in queue range selection
body:
This PR fixes a bug introduced in my previous PR #9719: I forgot to add equivalent code for queue range selections, so any instances of the unbounded literal `$` in these caused a null pointer dereference.

This code has now been added, alongside a null check for `context.currentQueue`, and a test for `$` in range selections.
